body:
We don't need this any longer since we're triggering on commit message content. A soft fail doesn't seem to stop dependents in Buildkite pipelines anyway.

Also, apparently a submodule is incompatible with Julia package management.
title: Remove performance check pipeline git diff step and git submodule

body:
This is an empty file that should be deleted. It is causing problems with `Pkg.add`.

```julia
(.buildkite) pkg> add ClimaCore#kp/pfull
    Updating git-repo `https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl.git`
ERROR: GitError(Code:ERROR, Class:Submodule, cannot get submodules without a working tree)
```

Edit: This isn't causing the problem. I haven't rebase from main, but this is an empty file that should be removed.
title: Delete .gitmodules

body:
This PR updates the CLA Actions workflow trigger from `pull_request` to `pull_request_target`.

<!-- Provide a clear description of the content -->

- [x] Code follows the [style guidelines](https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/) OR N/A.
- [x] Unit tests are included OR N/A.
- [x] Code is exercised in an integration test OR N/A.
- [x] Documentation has been added/updated OR N/A.
title: chore: changes the CLA action trigger to pull_request_target
